message:
✨ Volume normalization, warm failover, fix EPG lookup, sort favorites (#81)

- EBU R128 loudness normalization (loudnorm af filter) keeps volume consistent
  across stream switches — no more volume jumps on failover
- Warm failover: pre-buffers alternative stream in hidden player (no audio/video)
  when buffer drops low; instant-switches when ready instead of cold open
- Fix EPG lookup: tvgId (raw XMLTV channelId) now correctly maps to prefixed IDs
- Favorites sorted A-Z by display name
- Guide + channel list subtitle shows 'Provider · Group'
- Favorite list sheet auto-closes after 5s of inactivity

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
